_comment: AARM Azure Function — central job configuration file.
Deploy to: Storage Account → Container 'aarm-config' → Blob 'jobs.json'
CREDENTIAL SETUP (per job that uses client-secret or certificate authMode):
1. Create the client secret value as a secret in Azure Key Vault.
Example: az keyvault secret set --vault-name <vault> --name aarm-contoso-prod --value <secret>
2. Add a Function App Setting referencing the Key Vault secret:
Name:  AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD
Value: @Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/secrets/aarm-contoso-prod/)
CLI:   az functionapp config appsettings set --name <fn> --resource-group <rg>
--settings 'AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD=@Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=...)'
3. Set credentialRef in the job to the App Setting name: 'AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD'
4. The Azure Functions runtime resolves the Key Vault reference automatically.
Application code reads: process.env['AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD']
NAMING CONVENTION for App Settings:
AARM_SECRET_ + JOB_ID in UPPER_SNAKE_CASE
job id 'contoso-prod' → AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD
job id 'fabrikam-dev' → AARM_SECRET_FABRIKAM_DEV
Contoso PROD — daily scan at 06:00 UTC.
Uses a custom critical template stored in aarm-config/templates/critical-contoso.json.
App Setting required: AARM_SECRET_CONTOSO_PROD
Value: @Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/secrets/aarm-contoso-prod/)
Fabrikam DEV — weekly scan on Monday at 08:00 UTC.
Uses a custom summary template stored in aarm-config/templates/summary-fabrikam.json.
Error-only webhooks — no status or alert notifications.
App Setting required: AARM_SECRET_FABRIKAM_DEV
Value: @Microsoft.KeyVault(SecretUri=https://<vault>.vault.azure.net/secrets/aarm-fabrikam-dev/)
